meta.description: Career definitions. Each career defines 8 career skills (cheaper to advance) and 3 specialization deck IDs.

hired-gun.name: Hired Gun
hired-gun.description: Soldiers, brawlers, and mercenaries. The Hired Gun excels at direct combat and physical feats.

scoundrel.name: Scoundrel
scoundrel.description: Smugglers, gamblers, and silver-tongued rogues. The Scoundrel thrives on cunning and quick reflexes.

technician.name: Technician
technician.description: Mechanics, slicers, and inventors. The Technician turns technology into tactical advantage.

mystic.name: Mystic
mystic.description: Force sensitives, healers, and seers. The Mystic channels the Force to alter the battlefield.

commander.name: Commander
commander.description: Leaders, tacticians, and inspirational figures. The Commander empowers allies and controls the flow of battle.

bounty-hunter.name: Bounty Hunter
bounty-hunter.description: Trackers, assassins, and survivalists. The Bounty Hunter is a versatile combatant who always gets the target.
